query: Find 10 buildings in Trondheim municipality that intersect quick-clay hazard areas with high risk class and are closest to the municipality centroid, sorted by shortest distance first.

1.description: Get active municipalities with valid polygons

2.description: Find quick-clay hazard areas intersecting with municipalities

3.description: Filter quick-clay hazard areas by high risk class

4.description: Find nearest quick-clay hazard areas for each municipality

5.description: Get minimum distance to high risk quick-clay hazard areas

6.description: Sort municipalities by nearest distance to high risk quick-clay hazard areas

7.description: Limit the result to top 10 municipalities
